Bash(cd "C:/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson" && gh pr create --base master --head feature/story-03-password-reset --title "STORY-03: Password Reset" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- `POST /api/auth/password-reset/request` — always returns 200, sends reset token via email \(ConsoleEmailSender logs until SMTP configured\)
- `POST /api/auth/password-reset/confirm` — resets password; 400 with `InvalidToken` or `SsoUser` on failure
- `/forgot-password` and `/reset-password?token=&email=` pages
- "Forgot password?" link on sign-in page
- 6 TDD tests, EN/NL translations

## Test plan
- [ ] Sign-in page shows "Forgot password?" link
- [ ] Submit with unknown email → success message shown \(no error\)
- [ ] Submit with known email → token logged to console, success message shown
- [ ] Reset password with valid token → password changed, redirect to sign-in
- [ ] Reset password with expired/invalid token → user-friendly error
- [ ] SSO user reset attempt → "Use your SSO provider" message

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1 && gh pr merge --merge --delete-branch 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(cd "C:/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson/Itenium.SkillForge/backend" && dotnet ef migrations add CheckPending --project Itenium.SkillForge.Data --startup-project Itenium.SkillForge.WebApi 2>&1 | tail -15)

Bash(cd "C:/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson/Itenium.SkillForge/backend" && dotnet ef migrations add AddUserTeamManagement --project Itenium.SkillForge.Data --startup-project Itenium.SkillForge.WebApi --configuration Release 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(cat /c/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson/Itenium.SkillForge/frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d.get\('auth', {}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(cat /c/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson/Itenium.SkillForge/frontend/.prettierrc 2>/dev/null || cat /c/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson/Itenium.SkillForge/frontend/prettier.config.* 2>/dev/null || echo "No prettier config found")

Bash(git -C /c/Bootcamp-AI-Crimson commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
chore: change .editorconfig to crlf to match .gitattributes

write CRLF files directly, eliminating "LF will be replaced by CRLF"
warnings on Windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
